         ;; Application
         (else
          (apply (eval operator env)
                 (list-of-values operands env))))))
    (else
     (error "Unknown expression type -- EVAL" expr))))

;; Helper functions for evaluation
(define (list-of-values exps env)
  (if (null? exps)
      '()
      (cons (eval (car exps) env)
            (list-of-values (cdr exps) env))))

(define (eval-if exps env)
  (if (eval (car exps) env)
      (eval (car (cdr exps)) env)
      (if (null? (cdr (cdr exps)))
--

(define (primitive-procedure-names)
  '(+ - * / = < > <= >= cons car cdr null? pair? eq? equal? not and or getchr putchr chr read symbol symbol? string? number? set-car! set-cdr! display newline fopen fclose fgetchr fputchr fdisplay fread))

(define (primitive-procedure-objects)
  (list + - * / = < > <= >= cons car cdr null? pair? eq? equal? not and or getchr putchr chr read symbol symbol? string? number? set-car! set-cdr! display newline fopen fclose fgetchr fputchr fdisplay fread))


(define (primitive-procedure? proc)
  (memq proc (primitive-procedure-objects)))", "extras": {"command": "grep -A5 -B5 "list" /app/eval.scm", "metadata": {"exit_code": 0, "pid": -1, "username": "root", "hostname": "rack-ge107-ya-20250517193277", "working_dir": "/app", "py_interpreter_path": "/opt/openhands-venv/bin/python", "prefix": "", "suffix": "

        paren_count -= 1
    if paren_count < 0:
        print(f'Mismatched parenthesis at token {i}: {token}')
        break
print(f'Final parenthesis count: {paren_count}')
